name: Meatless Chili- Terlingua Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the tomato sauce and 4 cups of water in a deep 6 to 8 quart pot.
2. Add onion and garlic. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Add chili powder, cayenne, oregano, and paprika, stirring well.
5. Add texturized vegetable protein, stir well, and simmer for another 30 minutes.
6. Stir in cumin, and add water if needed to achieve the desired consistency. Cook for 5 more minutes.
7. If additional thickness is desired, stir in 1 tablespoon or corn meal (corn flour) into the chili. Cook for 8 to 10 minutes after adding the corn meal.
8. Serve this chili over cooked pinto or kidney beans if desired. It may also be used as a filling for tacos or enchiladas. Many people like chili with a small amount of grated low-fat cheese or toasted tortilla chips.
